declarations.description: Class. Web component that renders an animated loader while Ajax requests are being handled.
declarations.name: WebUIAjaxLoader

members.name: innerHTML
members.default: ` <svg role="img" focusable="false" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 100 100" part="svg" > <title>loading</title> <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="47" /> </svg> `

declarations.description: Class. Web component that progressively enhances the default CSS carousel.
declarations.name: WebUICarousel

members.name: setVisibleSlide
members.description: Use Intersection Observer API to identify visible slides, and manage focus states.

members.name: setCurrentSlideCounter
members.description: Set current slide, and update counters.

members.name: handleFocus
members.description: If any interactive elements inside slides receive focus, update current slide & counter.

members.name: handleKeyboardEvent
members.description: Move carousel to previous or next slide with arrow keys.

members.name: handleScrollEvent
members.description: Update slide counters when carousel is scrolled (swiped) on touch devices.

declarations.description: Class. Web component that shows/hides content.
declarations.name: WebUIDisclosure

members.name: randomString
members.description: Generate a random string using a given prefix.

members.name: handleGlobalKeyup
members.description: Handle global 'keyup' event to close disclosure.

members.name: handleGlobalClick
members.description: Handle global 'click' event to close disclosure.

declarations.description: Class. Web component to demo the core features of a component that has some Ajax dependencies.
declarations.name: WebUIFetchHtml

members.name: handleClick
members.description: Ajax callback function. Uses Fetch API.

declarations.description: Class. Web component that progressively enhances native HTML5 <form> validation.
declarations.name: WebUIFormValidate

members.name: handleBlur
members.description: Handle blur event on form fields.

members.name: showError
members.description: Show validation error messages, and add appropriate ARIA properties/states.

declarations.description: Class. Web component that makes a componenent clickable by following a primary link.
declarations.name: WebUIMakeClickable

declarations.description: Class. Web component that progressively enhances the native HTML <dialog> element, managing opening/closing and keyboard focus.
declarations.name: WebUIModal

members.name: handleOpen
members.description: Set focus on modal content when <dialog> is opened.

members.name: handleGlobalClick
members.description: Handle global 'click' event to close modal.

declarations.description: Class. Web component that turns a container into a (dismissable) notification.
declarations.name: WebUINotify

declarations.description: Class. Web component that progressively enhances native HTML popovers, falling back to <webui-disclosure> behaviour.
declarations.name: WebUIPopover

members.name: randomString
members.description: Generate a random string using a given prefix.

members.name: handleGlobalKeyup
members.description: Handle global 'keyup' event to close disclosure.

members.name: handleGlobalClick
members.description: Handle global 'click' event to close disclosure.

declarations.description: Class. Web component that progressively enhances a native HTML <datalist> search component, fetching results from an API endpoint.
declarations.name: WebUIPredictiveSearch

members.name: handleInput
members.description: Ajax callback function. Uses Fetch API.

declarations.description: Class. Web component that progressively enhances HTML <table> elements by wrapping them with an overflowing container.
declarations.name: WebUIProse

members.name: wrapTables
members.description: Add table wrapper and accessibility properties.

declarations.description: Class. Web component that progressively enhances HTML <input type="range"> elements by displaying the value inside an <output>.
declarations.name: WebUIRangeInput

declarations.description: Class. Web component that enables a share <button> to use the native Share API, falling back to a <webui-disclosure> containing a URL that can be copied to clipboard.
declarations.name: WebUIShare

members.name: handleShare
members.description: Use native Share API, or fallback to <webui-disclosure>.

members.name: handleCopyUrl
members.description: Fallback behaviour. Allows URL to be copied to clipboard.

declarations.description: Class. Web component that progressively enhances a set of in-page HTML <a> elements into an accessible tab interface.
declarations.name: WebUITabs

members.name: bindClickEvent
members.description: Handle web component click event listener.

members.name: bindKeyboardEvent
members.description: Handle web component keyboard event listener. Prevent viewport scrolling when tab focus changes.

members.name: createTabs
members.description: Setup tabs structure. Add accessibility attributes.

declarations.description: Class. Web component that updates the ARIA state of an HTML <button role="switch"> when clicked.
declarations.name: WebUIToggle

declarations.description: Class. Web component that progressively enhances a "lightbox" built with native HTML <dialog> and Invoker Commands API, to lazy load an embedded video <iframe>.
declarations.name: WebUIVideoPlayer

members.name: handlePlay
members.description: Lazy load <iframe> when play button is clicked.

members.name: handleModalClose
members.description: Stop video playing when modal is closed. Uses MutationObserver to detect when <dialog> 'open' attribute is removed. See https://bugs.chromium.org/p/chromium/issues/detail?id=1481718#c1. Note that this "fix" does not work in Firefox.
